path.id: Tell us about colors, specific flowers, or the occasion...
We proudly offer delivery exclusively within the territory of the Republic of Croatia (Vrijedi za podruÄje Republike Hrvatske). We ensure our delicate arrangements arrive in perfect condition.
For custom box arrangements, please allow at least 48 hours. For larger events or specific floral requests, 1-2 weeks is recommended to source the finest blooms.
Standard delivery within Zagreb is free. For other regions in Croatia, a flat fee applies which will be calculated upon confirming your order details.
